findings_summary: Dry-run release-control proof passed: the release operations worker prepared a public-safe packet and kept production promotion blocked unless separate human gate, rollback, smoke and monitoring evidence exist.
next_action: Use this packet only as dry-run validation evidence. Any real promotion must collect a fresh product-specific human gate, rollback proof, smoke result and monitoring evidence before release operations can proceed.

production_release_decision.reason: No production release was attempted or approved. Dry-run PASS does not grant authority for deploy, environment mutation, secret access, release signing, DNS, IAM or KMS changes.
required_before_unblock: fresh product-specific R4 human gate record
release plan with exact target, owner, window and frozen artifact identity
rollback plan with tested restore or reversal evidence
pre-release and post-release smoke evidence for the target environment
monitoring plan with alert owner, incident path and rollback signals
security and public-safety evidence reconciled against the release scope

release_plan.promotion_rule_applied: R4 release waits for a real human gate and rollback evidence; this packet proves the release-control block, not a production release.

rollback_plan.dry_run_reversal: If this packet is rejected, discard the two qvg-release-ops-result artifacts and keep production blocked.
real_release_requirements: named rollback owner and incident owner
versioned artifact or configuration restore point
tested rollback command or documented manual reversal
monitoring signals that indicate rollback is required

smoke_result.scope: dry-run artifact and repository safety validation only
smoke_result.production_smoke_blocker: A real release still needs target-environment smoke before and after promotion.

required_for_real_release: release dashboard or equivalent signal source

production_blockers.note: The available human-gate record is bounded to dry-run evidence generation and is not reusable for product approval.
No tested production rollback or recovery evidence was supplied for this dry run.
No target-environment pre-release or post-release smoke was executed.
No production monitoring owner, alert path, release dashboard, incident path or rollback signal evidence was supplied.
Release operations authority remains limited to preparing evidence; it cannot release without the required gate package.

requested_commands.result: python command not found on host
python command not found on host
python command not found on host

reusability_note: This is real evidence for the dry-run release-control proof only. It is not reusable as production release approval, product safety evidence, human approval, rollback proof, monitoring proof or smoke proof.
